response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Song segment matched the reference lyrics closely, with a correction from '分かり合えた' to '分かち合えた' to match both the sung vocals and on-screen text. 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics reference was fully utilized for the first segment; the second segment was manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings were strictly anchored to exact vocal starts to prevent any cascading delays, especially during rapid speech and transitions.

subtitles.original: 昼下がり、じめつく風の季節は
subtitles.english: In the early afternoon, in the season of sticky wind,

subtitles.original: 想い馳せる、まだ何者でもなかった僕らの肖像
subtitles.english: Thinking back, a portrait of us when we were still nobodies.

subtitles.original: 何もかも分かち合えたはずだった
subtitles.english: We should have been able to share everything.

subtitles.original: あの日から少しずつ
subtitles.english: Since that day, little by little,

subtitles.original: 君と違う僕という呪いが肥っていく
subtitles.english: The curse of me being different from you has grown.

subtitles.original: きみの笑顔の奥の憂いを
subtitles.english: The sorrow deep within your smile,

subtitles.original: 見落としたこと、悔やみ尽くして
subtitles.english: Having missed it, I regret it endlessly.

subtitles.original: 徒花と咲いて散っていくきみに
subtitles.english: To you, blooming and scattering like a sterile flower,

subtitles.original: さよなら
subtitles.english: Goodbye.

subtitles.original: 今でも青が棲んでいる
subtitles.english: Even now, the blue still dwells inside.

subtitles.original: 今でも青は澄んでいる
subtitles.english: Even now, the blue remains clear.

subtitles.original: どんな祈りも言葉も
subtitles.english: No matter what prayer or word,

subtitles.original: 近づけるのに、届かなかった
subtitles.english: Though it got us closer, it never reached.

subtitles.original: まるで、静かな恋のような
subtitles.english: Just like a quiet love,

subtitles.original: 頬を伝った夏のような色のなか
subtitles.english: Amidst a color like summer running down my cheek.

subtitles.original: きみを呪う言葉が
subtitles.english: The words that curse you

subtitles.original: ずっと喉の奥につかえてる
subtitles.english: Are still stuck in the back of my throat.

subtitles.original: 「また会えるよね」って、声にならない声
subtitles.english: A silent voice saying, "We'll meet again, right?"

subtitles.original: 無限に膨張する銀河の星の粒のように
subtitles.english: Like the grains of stars in an infinitely expanding galaxy,

subtitles.original: 指の隙間を零れた
subtitles.english: They slipped through the cracks of my fingers.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、ここまで一気に
subtitles.english: Yes! So, we've brought you up to here

subtitles.original: ノーストップでお送りしました！
subtitles.english: in one non-stop go!

subtitles.original: 平成も、令和も、名曲ばかりでしたね！
subtitles.english: Whether from Heisei or Reiwa, they were all masterpiece songs, weren't they?

subtitles.original: どうでしたか？好きな曲はありましたか？
subtitles.english: How was it? Did you have any favorite songs?

subtitles.original: そして、みんな、どっちのチームが良かったかな？
subtitles.english: And also, everyone, which team do you think was better?

subtitles.original: えーとですね、このね、今、後ろのこのハートのステージね、
subtitles.english: Well, you see, this stage with the heart behind me now...

subtitles.original: はい、こちらのハートに映し出された色で、
subtitles.english: Yes, by the color projected onto this heart,

subtitles.original: どっちのチームが勝ったのか決まります！
subtitles.english: it will decide which team won!

subtitles.original: ぜひ、みんなコメントで、どっちが良かったか教えてください！
subtitles.english: Please, everyone, tell me in the comments which one you liked!

subtitles.original: ええ？「決められない」？
subtitles.english: Eh? "You can't decide"?

subtitles.original: いやいや、そこはね、ちょっとね、決めて...
subtitles.english: No, no, you have to choose...

subtitles.original: あ、すごい、この二色にね、分かれておりますけれども、
subtitles.english: Ah, wow, it's divided into these two colors,

subtitles.original: しっかり決めていただかないと！
subtitles.english: but you really have to choose one!

subtitles.original: はい、今日はね、あの平成VS令和となっております。
subtitles.english: Yes, today is Heisei vs. Reiwa!

subtitles.original: はい、ということで、勝ったのは平成・赤チームか、
subtitles.english: Alright, so, did the Heisei Red Team win,

subtitles.original: それとも、令和・青チームか、
subtitles.english: or the Reiwa Blue Team?

subtitles.original: 一体どっちかな？
subtitles.english: Which one could it be?

subtitles.original: それじゃあ、いくよ！
subtitles.english: Well then, here we go!

subtitles.original: さあ、結果はこちら！
subtitles.english: Alright, here is the result!

subtitles.original: お？
subtitles.english: Oh?

subtitles.original: え？なんか、紫になっちゃったんですけど！
subtitles.english: Eh? Wait, it turned purple!

subtitles.original: 紫って、紫ってどっちですか？
subtitles.english: Purple? Which one is purple?

subtitles.original: うーん、もうこれは、あの、赤チームも良かったし、青チームも良かったということで、
subtitles.english: Hmm, well, I guess both the Red Team and the Blue Team were great,

subtitles.original: すべてフュージョンして紫になってしまったということで、
subtitles.english: so they fused together and became purple!

subtitles.original: いや、みんな、あのたくさん歌ったし、
subtitles.english: So, well, everyone sang so much,

subtitles.original: ま、みんな最高だったってことにね、します！
subtitles.english: and we'll just say everyone was the absolute best!

subtitles.original: いや、なんか、なんかね、みんなのおかげで、あ、なんか、パワーが、
subtitles.english: Wow, somehow... somehow, thanks to everyone, I feel like power...

subtitles.original: パワーが溜まってきた気がするな！
subtitles.english: I feel like power is filling up inside me!

subtitles.original: 気がする！
subtitles.english: I really do feel it!

subtitles.original: うふふ、ということで、新衣装です！
subtitles.english: Ehehe, and with that, here is my new outfit!

subtitles.original: えー、みんなのコメ...
subtitles.english: Well, everyone's comm...
